text:

Moin moin 


kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update KDE Frameworks to 5.87.

The patch is attached, but can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-KDE-Update-KDE-Frameworks-to-5.87.0.patch


mfg Tobias
